codeReview.summary: Current HEAD now satisfies the feature contract even though the original handoff commit was incomplete. The live onchain catalog is request-burst deduped via an in-module promise cache, Ethereum pool list/detail routes are covered by tests that prove live reserve_usd/volume_usd/price_usd behavior plus seeded fallback, expanded network and DEX catalog behavior is explicitly asserted from current HEAD, and the compare-coingecko summary test no longer uses the prior 15000 ms timeout masking.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The onchain worker handoff for session 021542ad-64ee-454c-8cc2-3c7bf9f492ae claimed the feature was contained in commit 6efb253 even though the transcript skeleton shows source edits to src/modules/onchain.ts and repeated test reruns before that commit, and git show 6efb253 still only contains provider fallback plus the old timeout increase.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff /home/whoami/.factory/missions/f3507a1f-9e14-4c7c-a7d4-636d4909f2b3/handoffs/2026-03-27T03-45-44-472Z__wire-onchain-pool-endpoints-live__021542ad-64ee-454c-8cc2-3c7bf9f492ae.json attributes live-catalog reuse to commit 6efb253, but git show 6efb253 touches only src/providers/defillama.ts and two test files while current HEAD contains the cache in src/modules/onchain.ts:294-411.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission guidance still understates the need for current-head proof when a prior feature commit is misattributed. This re-review had to validate current repository state rather than the recorded commit because the original feature commit did not fully contain the claimed live catalog wiring.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Prior review file /home/whoami/dev/openGecko/.factory/validation/onchain-live-data/scrutiny/reviews/wire-onchain-pool-endpoints-live.json failed on commit-attribution and timeout masking; current HEAD now proves the behavior in tests/app.test.ts:1949-2068 and tests/app.test.ts:2149-2219, but that proof is not tied to commit 6efb253.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The shared architecture note is stale for onchain behavior. It still says all onchain routes are fixture-backed even though current HEAD now performs live DeFiLlama-backed catalog expansion and Ethereum pool patching with seeded fallback semantics.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /home/whoami/dev/openGecko/.factory/library/architecture.md says 'All 29 onchain routes exist but are fixture-backed', while src/modules/onchain.ts:294-411 builds a live catalog from DeFiLlama and tests/app.test.ts:1949-2068 plus 2149-2219 assert live-expanded networks and live pool reserve_usd/volume_usd/price_usd behavior.

summary: Pass on current HEAD. The original handoff commit was still misattributed, but the previously blocking gaps are now closed: compare coverage no longer depends on the removed 15000 ms timeout, live-expanded onchain network/DEX catalog behavior is explicitly proven by tests, Ethereum pool list/detail routes prove live reserve_usd/volume_usd/price_usd with seeded fallback, and unknown-network negative coverage exists without requiring scrutiny to rely on timeout masking.
